channel.title: UB Analytics · World Cup 2026 Predictions
channel.description: Matchday predictions with public track record.

item.title: Qatar vs Switzerland: Switzerland by 2 (79%)
item.description: Group B, 2026-06-13, Santa Clara. Qatar 6% / draw 15% / Switzerland 79%. Predicted margin 2.

item.title: Brazil vs Morocco: Brazil by 1 (42%)
item.description: Group C, 2026-06-13, East Rutherford. Brazil 42% / draw 29% / Morocco 29%. Predicted margin 1.

item.title: Haiti vs Scotland: Scotland by 1 (51%)
item.description: Group C, 2026-06-13, Foxborough. Haiti 21% / draw 28% / Scotland 51%. Predicted margin 1.

item.title: Australia vs Turkey: Turkey by 1 (39%)
item.description: Group D, 2026-06-13, Vancouver. Australia 32% / draw 29% / Turkey 39%. Predicted margin 1.
